system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I need some urgent help with an order I placed. It was accidentally sent to Texas instead of my address, and I need to get the tracking number for it. Also, I want to return everything in that order except for the pet bed. I don’t remember my order number, though. Can you help me with this? My name is Isabella Johansson, and my zip code is 32286.

I'm here to help! However, I need to authenticate your identity before proceeding. Could you please confirm if your name is spelled exactly as "Isabella Johansson" and your zip code is "32286"? If so, I will try again to locate your account. If there are any differences in spelling or zip code, please let me know.
Yes, my name is spelled exactly "Isabella Johansson" and my zip code is "32286." That's correct.

I'm having trouble accessing your account with the information provided. To assist you further, could you please provide your email address associated with your account? This will help me locate your order and resolve your issue quickly.

I’m really sorry, but I actually don’t remember which email I used for the order. Is there any other way you can look it up? Maybe by my name, zip code, or shipping address? I just really need to get the tracking number and sort out the return as soon as possible.

Thank you for your patience. At this time, I can only look up your account using your name and zip code or your email address. Since the system is not locating your account with your name and zip code, and you don’t remember your email, I’m unable to access your order details directly.

To resolve this quickly, could you try to recall any possible email addresses you might have used? Even a partial email or a list of possible emails could help. Alternatively, if you have any confirmation emails or receipts from your order, those might contain your order number or the email address used.

If you’re unable to provide this information, I can transfer you to a human agent who may be able to assist you further. Would you like me to do that?

I understand, and I really appreciate your help. Unfortunately, I don’t have access to my emails right now, and I can’t remember which one I used. If you could transfer me to a human agent, that would be great—I really need to get this sorted out as soon as possible. Thank you!

arguments.summary: User Isabella Johansson (zip 32286) needs urgent help with an order sent to the wrong address. She needs the tracking number and wants to return all items except a pet bed, but cannot recall her order number or email. Unable to authenticate with available info.

messages.content:
Thank you for your understanding. I will transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further with your order and return request. 

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
